summary: Created the US-846 rule-critical coverage matrix at docs/test-design/us-846-rule-critical-coverage-matrix.md. The matrix traces PERSONAL-REQ-1763, PERSONAL-AC-2430, and PERSONAL-AC-2431 to current unit/integration evidence, identifies the missing requested US-841 completion report path, and explicitly marks full-bullet smoke as the remaining executable gap for MZ-602 rather than overstating current harness/source evidence. MZ-601 is ready to accept as a QA/test-design task, but US-846 release readiness is not yet satisfied because AC-2431 still lacks a real bullet-completion smoke test.

tests_run.evidence: Read active Spexus tenant/project/component scope before task and epic artifacts. Active project PERSONAL, component default.
Confirmed task [MZ-601] US-846 QA coverage matrix under PERSONAL-EP-180 with refs PERSONAL-US-846 / PERSONAL-REQ-1763 / PERSONAL-AC-2430 / PERSONAL-AC-2431 / PERSONAL-STD-063.
Loaded epic hierarchy and full US-841 through US-846 requirement/acceptance context before drafting the matrix.

tests_run.command: rg --files / sed / rg inspection across package.json, docs/test-design, src/domain/*.test.ts, src/ai/*.test.ts, src/persistence/*.test.ts, src/test/*.test.ts, and requested task-reports
tests_run.evidence: Confirmed current executable test inventory, current QA design docs, requested dependency reports present or missing at the exact paths, and harness/smoke surfaces relevant to US-846.

tests_run.command: test -s docs/test-design/us-846-rule-critical-coverage-matrix.md && rg -n "Full-bullet smoke|Acceptance Readiness For MZ-601|missing at requested path" docs/test-design/us-846-rule-critical-coverage-matrix.md
tests_run.evidence: Verified the matrix file exists, is non-empty, records the missing requested US-841 report path, calls out the full-bullet smoke gap, and includes an explicit MZ-601 acceptance section.
Verified the final task report is valid JSON.

tests_run.command: rg -n "Reserved seed for future full-bullet smoke runs|runDeterministicSmoke\(|keeps state valid after several legal actions" src/test/integrationHarness.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts
tests_run.evidence: Verified the current smoke surface stops at a short fixed-step harness and an 8-step engine loop, which supports classifying AC-2431 as an executable gap rather than covered behavior.

risks: task-reports/PERSONAL-US-841/review-cycle-1/review-report.json is missing at the exact requested path, so report-layer dependency traceability for US-841 is weaker than for US-842 through US-845.

PERSONAL-AC-2431 is still a real coverage gap: the repo does not yet contain a deterministic full-bullet smoke test that reaches phase=finished without unhandled error, illegal AI action, or stuck actor.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Rule-critical coverage matrix must trace deck/deal, bidding, fixed agreement profile, legal actions, trick winner, whist/half-whist, all-pass, misere, scoring, save/load, AI legality, and full-bullet smoke to executable owners.
evidence_matrix.limitations: All areas except full-bullet smoke have current executable evidence. The matrix explicitly records AC-2431 as a remaining executable gap for MZ-602.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Current unit/integration suite covers deck/deal, bidding, legal actions, trick winner, whist, all-pass, misere, scoring, persistence, and AI legality.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/domain/cards.test.ts; src/domain/rules.test.ts; src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/domain/scoring.test.ts; src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts; src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts; src/test/startResume.integration.test.ts; src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts; src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: This task confirmed inventory and traceability only. It did not rerun the broad test suite because MZ-601 scope is QA design, not release verification.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Current repo should contain a deterministic full-bullet smoke that completes a bullet without unhandled error, illegal AI action, or stuck active player.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Current harness smoke is limited to a short fixed step count and explicitly reserves the fullBulletSmoke seed for future work. No current test proves bullet completion.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Read exact dependency report paths where present and do not infer alternate attempts.
evidence_matrix.limitations: task-reports/PERSONAL-US-841/review-cycle-1/review-report.json was absent at the requested path, so the matrix used current executable persistence tests and US-841 design docs instead of inventing a different completion report.

evidence_matrix.scenario: US-846 matrix must explicitly classify security-review as not applicable unless security-sensitive behavior is discovered.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 hierarchy; package.json; current source/test inventory
evidence_matrix.limitations: Classification is valid for the current static localStorage browser app scope. It must be revisited only if later tasks add backend/auth/network-sensitive behavior, which is not expected here.

quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: Correct artifact read order and scope confirmation before drafting the matrix.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Presence alone does not satisfy downstream executable coverage gaps.

quality_gate_matrix.evidence_source: Current repo test files and prior US design/review artifacts listed in verification_environment.source_artifacts_reviewed
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: Traceability from REQ/AC to concrete unit/integration owners and identification of missing smoke coverage.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: This task intentionally avoided claiming fresh passing test execution beyond lightweight file/JSON checks.

quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: Explicit identification of the remaining AC-2431 gap and assignment to MZ-602/MZ-603/MZ-604.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Gate is not satisfied for US-846 overall until a real bullet-completion smoke test exists.

quality_gate_matrix.evidence_source: docs/test-design/us-846-rule-critical-coverage-matrix.md sections MZ-603 Regression Verification Expectations and MZ-604 Release-Readiness Expectations
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: Downstream rerun expectations and release-gate boundaries.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: This task defines the gate but does not execute the regression suite.

quality_gate_matrix.evidence_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 hierarchy; package.json; static localStorage app architecture
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_for: Explicit NFR classification required by the task.
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Would need revisiting only if later tasks introduce new sensitive boundaries.
